title: NCERT Is Hiring
description:
Most people think NCERT only hires teachers.
That’s not true.
NCERT just opened 173 non-academic government jobs — including:
 • Production Officers
 • Script Writers
 • PR Officers
 • Admin & technical roles
These are central government jobs under the 7th Pay Commission.
 Eligibility ranges from 10th pass to postgraduate.

Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/fulldisclosure.ig/
